$ docker build -t myapp:latest .
Sending build context to Docker daemon  2.048MB
Step 1/6 : FROM node:20-alpine
 ---> 1234567890ab
Step 2/6 : WORKDIR /app
 ---> Using cache
 ---> abcdef123456
Step 3/6 : COPY package*.json ./
 ---> 0987654321fe
Step 4/6 : RUN npm ci
#5 [3/6] RUN npm ci 0.4s
#5 [3/6] RUN npm ci 1.2s
#5 [3/6] RUN npm ci 3.7s
#5 => => transferring context: 42kB 0.1s
#5 => => resolve sha256:deadbeefcafef00dbaadf00ddeadbeef 0.0s
#5 [3/6] RUN npm ci DONE 5.1s
 ---> fedcba654321
Step 5/6 : COPY . .
 ---> 1122334455aa
Step 6/6 : CMD ["npm","start"]
 ---> Running in abc123
 ---> 998877665544
